# Implementation Decisions: User Authentication Service (Grizz - Go/gRPC)

This document captures architectural and implementation decisions made during the planning phase.

## Decision 1: JWT token expiration strategy

- **Category:** security
- **Constraint Type:** soft
- **Can proceed without approval**

### Options
- Short-lived (15min) with refresh
- Medium-lived (2hrs)
- Long-lived (24hrs)
